author: @Marian_Martin_Morgenstern
text:
IF that video have been done for selling the how-to-do-plans, it would be 100% the best of in Late stage Capitalism I have ever seen...
To be BSing people out of their money, by using the BS other capitalists used to market and sell BS stuff as innovative…

The Innovative Power of Capitalism wasn't inventing new Tech, but just in inventing new ways to con the Working Class out of their money

author: @VoidySA
text: Unfortunately there's a lot of dumb people out there, and the worst thing is they do not know they're dumb, and that's why there will never be equality in this world because we're simply not all equal and that's a fact, no matter how politically correct anyone wants to be, not all of us can be Einstein, or Tesla or Newton, the best you can do is to accept that there are more intelligent people than you and there are less intelligent people than you and go on with your life, do the best that YOU can and a more intelligent person will maybe help you to realize a dream, or he'll just steal the idea.
